---
title: ""
about: 
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/montana_picture.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links: 
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:hoover7@stolaf.edu
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/ghoover24
---


:::{#intro-heading}
## Gaby Hoover
she/her

### Personal
I am currently sophomore at St. Olaf College, double majoring in Psychology and Statistics & Data Scientist. I am also a clarinetist in both the St. Olaf Band and Orchestra. In my limited free time, I like to watch reality TV or dramas and knit (ask me about Survivor or The Sopranos!). 

### Contact Information

**Email:** <a href='mailto:hoover7@stolaf.edu'>hoover7@stolaf.edu</a>
